productName: Mix Seleccion cacahuetes, maices, almendras, anacardos y pistachos

classification.reason: may contain milk claim found on packaging photo

ingredients.rawText: Ingredientes: cacahuetes repelados fritos (46%) (cacahuetes, aceite refinado de girasol (4%), sal (2%)), maices fritos (30%) (maices, aceite refinado de girasol (9%), sal (1,7%)), almendras repeladas fritas (8%) (almendras, aceite refinado de girasol (4%), sal (2%)), anacardos fritos (8%) (anacardos, aceite refinado de girasol (4%), sal (2%)), pistachos mondados tostados (8%). Puede contener otros frutos de cascara, leche y derivados (incluida lactosa), soja y productos a base de soja.

notes: Milk and lactose are listed only in the may-contain warning, not as direct ingredients.
Online review notes matched the packaging warning but the final classification is based on the packaging photo.
